title: StudyTme's Channel Trailer
text: Ciao, I'm Giulia. I'm a study streamer, so the majority of my time on Twitch is spent working on my project and well, studying. I stream every day 9am to 7pm French time, apart from Saturdays. When I'm not studying or working on my thesis, I love having fun with the viewers. We have our fair share of technical difficulties, guest appearances and trolls. While I take pride in helping my viewers keeping away distractions, here's what can happen when focus isn't a priority. James Bond, you're not killing me this time. Thanks for stopping by. Please consider following to join the CIO gang.

key_moments.text: I stream every day 9am to 7pm French time, apart from Saturdays.
